description: Phase C of the 4-phase code-folder README pipeline. Discovery showed actual scope is far smaller than the original plan estimated: 8 git-tracked folders in system-spec-kit/mcp_server need new sk-doc READMEs (96 of 116 already pass validate from prior packets, 12 are gitignored noise). Target folders are fixture and config dirs: .github/hooks, .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/data, matrix_runners/templates, tests/advisor-fixtures, tests/description/fixtures, tests/fixtures/council-value, tests/fixtures/council-value/data, tests/validation/fixtures.
